_comment: Cavalry grid-pitch demo: a Cavalry regiment on its own anisotropic grid (1.0 m between files, 3.0 m between ranks) drawn up beside an Infantry block at foot close order, then both marched a short leg forward. The side-by-side framing makes the pitch change legible at a glance -- the 80-horse block stands wider AND far deeper than the 120-man foot block (220x360 wu vs 126x63 at spawn) -- and the march shows the deep column moving as a body. Drill: the grid itself is the whole subject; an enemy would be noise.
